data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-owner/per-team compliance reporting.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Per-owner/per-team compliance reporting', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate this reporting capability is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions the need for compliance reporting, yet there are no specific endpoints or entities provided that confirm its existence or functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of per-owner/per-team compliance reporting.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for compliance reporting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the per-owner/per-team compliance reporting requirement.
